Nxd4 Nf6 5. Nc3 a6 6.Bg5 Black must react in order to avoid doubled pawns on the f file. The most popular and almost only available option is [[/6...e6/]]. [[/6...Nbd7/]] is also playable. ==Theory table== {{Chess Opening Theory/Table}}. '''1.e4 c5 2.Nf3 d6 3.d4 cxd4 4.Nxd4 Nf6 5. Nc3 a6 6.Bg5'''
